title: EvidenceBundleManifest v1
description: Manifest of all artifacts that constitute a complete evidence bundle for a given decision or audit period. Each leaf has a type, reference (URI/path), and content digest. The manifest itself is SHA-256 hashed; the resulting digest is bound into DecisionReceipt.evidence_bundle_manifest_digest. STRICT deployments require all mandatory_leaf_types to be present with digests. Auditors can verify completeness and integrity without re-running the server by: (1) checking all required leaf types are present, (2) fetching each artifact, (3) comparing its sha256 to the stored digest.

decision_id.description: The decision_id from DecisionReceipt this manifest covers. May also be a period identifier (e.g. audit-2026-Q1) for period bundles.

audit_chain_seq_range.description: The chain_seq range this bundle covers.

leaves.description: Ordered list of all artifacts in this bundle.

leaf_id.description: Stable identifier for this leaf within the manifest.

kind.description: Artifact type. Verifier enforces that all mandatory kinds for the profile are present.

ref.description: URI, S3 path, local path, or opaque artifact identifier.

digest.description: SHA-256 content digest of the artifact. Required in STRICT for all leaves.

mandatory.description: True if this leaf is required by the verifier rules for the bundle's profile.

missing_leaves.description: Leaf kinds declared as mandatory by verifier-rules.v3.json but not yet collected. Populated by the bundle assembler; must be empty for a STRICT bundle to pass verification.

allOf.description: STRICT: missing_leaves must be empty (no mandatory artifact missing).
STRICT: every leaf must have a digest.
